title: jlens action record v1
description: A READ-ONLY / PLANNED next-action record derived from an auto_outcome candidate (M16). It records what action a verifier signal SUGGESTS (retrieval / checker / review / none) — it does NOT execute anything by default. NO raw task/output text: only ids, enums, a reason code, a confidence, and a hashed evidence tag. This is a SEPARATE schema; frozen schemas are not modified.

reason_code.description: short machine code, e.g. current_info_freshness, math_checker_available, low_confidence_escalation

source_verifier.description: which verifier signal produced this action, or null

status.description: default 'planned' — read-only; 'skipped' when no approved checker applies. 'completed'/'failed' only ever set by an approved deterministic action, never fabricated.

evidence_hash.description: stable non-reversible hash of inputs; NEVER raw text
